commit_scope: Pin the public deployment observer to the immutable merged kernel-replacement workflow and invoke it after the Hostinger production roll-forward.

local_validation.notes: The fresh worktree grounded 1,549/1,549 sources and re-embedded the full native semantic-v2 index. Sixty observer and grounded-runtime tests pass. The runtime OIDC policy and reusable workflow call both pin bootstrap merge f1166a6e64517fec5c232b07396ff61c9cf53afa; a regression test refuses drift between them.

ci_validation.notes: Exact-head PR checks run after this deployment integration commit is pushed.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger production plus GitHub Actions OIDC external observer
deploy_validation.notes: After merge, Hostinger Auto Deploy must roll forward the merge SHA, the immutable reusable observer must persist its WITNESS, and public verification must return the exact all-four-axis OBSERVED trust row.

phase_gate.reason: Immutable binding and local proof pass; CI, merge, production roll-forward, authenticated observation, and public verification remain.

evidence_refs: Bootstrap replacement PR #3960 merged as f1166a6e64517fec5c232b07396ff61c9cf53afa after Thread Gates run 29465293159, Windows Host Floor run 29465293168, GitGuardian, and all resolved review threads passed at exact head 6ce44f554bf79f4405ef89981146353a36fd66dc.

The caller remains protected-main .github/workflows/hostinger-auto-deploy.yml; the external job uses .github/workflows/public-deployment-observer.yml at immutable merge f1166a6e64517fec5c232b07396ff61c9cf53afa.

GitHub OIDC binds repository and owner numeric identities, protected main, Production environment, caller workflow, target workflow SHA, reusable job workflow SHA, run identity, one-time challenge, and short token lifetime.
Observed:yes remains unavailable until the public deployed SHA and authenticated WITNESS both match the final integration merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Every protected-main production roll-forward invokes independently authenticated observer bytes from immutable merge f1166a6e64517fec5c232b07396ff61c9cf53afa; a native ask can report observed:yes only for the exact deployed merge after the observer persists a valid WITNESS.
test_flows: runtime policy pin equals the reusable workflow ref pin
Hostinger deploy completes before the observer job begins
GitHub OIDC observer creates a deployed-SHA-bound WITNESS
verify_observed_deployment_ask.sh accepts only the exact OBSERVED trust row
